horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: The last week of March will witness Sun playing major role in your life. The Sun will be with Venus and it will conjunct Neptune as well. You will buy new clothes, grooming items, or accessories, some people will get a new haircut, so that you can have a fresh look. You will be visible in the public domain, and you will also get a new job, so you can expect interviews. Since the Sun and Venus, both are visible planets, people will appreciate your presence, and they will take the initiative to meet you. This transit is going to bring more action, updating your profile, and attend social gatherings.

Neptune, the god of ocean will conjunct the Sun, king of the zodiac, so you may be a bit distracted, so forgetfulness can happen. There will be some changes in your plans midway, cancel outings, or prefer quiet places instead busy environments. Neptune is a complex planet, so there will be emotional concerns, so, make sure you don’t argue with someone, as there are chances for potential conflicts. There are chances for misunderstandings, so make sure you air your opinion when you someone ask for it.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the water sign, so you will be making some private plans for your life. You will handle some private tasks, alone, and you will make sure you finish the work. There will be some updates from the foreign lands, and it can be like some news about your visa, or settlement related matter. Both the planets will aspect the sixth house, so you will try to work hard to improve your career. There will be discussions with your colleagues, but there will be some arguments too. The twelfth house indicates dreams, intuition and spirituality, so you will spend time in prayer and meditation too.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: The last week of March will not have major planetary transits, other than Neptune conjuncting the Sun Aries. This conjunction is going to trigger your private affairs, so you will spend time in handling private tasks, working alone or completing some work. You will make secret calls or private calls, and deal with matters which required confidentiality. The Sun doesn’t like the conjunction with Neptune, so you will have to be careful with your emotions, as there will be certain events which will result in burst outs. Since Neptune is the planet for illusion, so you will have a lot complex dreams, which will give you some signals about your future.

Venus is also there with the Sun, so you will have some pleasant experience, like meeting someone special in isolated circumstances. You may have some concerns about your love life, so, this is not the time to start a new relationship, but this is the ideal time to spend in meditation and prayer. Foreign trips, long distance travels and some updates about your foreign stay also can come up during this time. Job seekers will get the closest time to get a new job, and there are chances for issues with your colleagues too.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the eleventh house, and this will make you socially active, and busy with group interactions. Taurus Sun, Moon and rising natives will attend meetings debates, or social gatherings, which can result in planning and coordination. You will have short distance travels, thus meet your friends, colleagues or elder siblings. However, both Mars and Mercury are not friendly with each other, so there are chances for clashes in the team meetings. You may also get new friends new projects, and you will plan for long term investments too. Single Taurus natives will get many chance to interact with people from opposite gender.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: For Gemini Sun, Moon and rising signs, the last week of March will make them very busy as there is a huge planetary activity by the Sun, Venus and Neptune occurring in the eleventh house. You will be attending team meetings, social gatherings, or networking events where you meet friends, colleagues or new contacts. This is a great time for job seekers as they will get the closest opportunity to find a new job, so they should be prepared for interviews and written tests. The week will be full planning, and the sole aim to make more money in the future.

The Sun and Neptune are conjunct and they will aspect the fifth house of creativity. This is a red flag, as the Sun is conjuncting the planet of illusion, so naturally, there will be some misconception about your business skills, and this is not the time to invest in risky ventures. Otherwise, there will be huge losses in the near future, so make decisions after consulting with an expert. Some plans may unclear for you, and the event timings can change, or your information will be incomplete or wrong. Your children also need more support, so there will be more time with them.

Mars and Mercury are in impacting the tenth house, so the career is very important for every Gemini Sun, Moon and rising signs. There will be important meetings with your managers, you will have to handle multiple responsibilities, and some unexpected projects can also come up. The communications will be repeating, email will require follow ups, as Mercury has just come out of its retrogression zone. Job seekers will have the closest opportunities to get a new job, so they should continue job search. Please make sure you listen to the instructions carefully, otherwise there will be lot of errors at work.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: The transit Sun and Venus will be in the tenth house, so your career will be the main focus along with some secret projects. You will have meetings with managers or government officers and handle important responsibilities at work. There will be many opportunities to present your ideas, submit reports, or represent even your company. The Sun and Venus conjunction is not so good, so there are chances for arguments with your managers too. Please make sure you read the instructions carefully, and confirm the details carefully. Sometimes, you managers can ask for last minute changes , so you must be prepared for that.

The Sun and Venus will aspect the fourth house of home, and Neptune also will aspect the same house, so your home and family matters also will be important. You will get work from home opportunities, and there will be some family functions as well. Neptune, the planet of illusion, so you may have go through some clashes at home due to misunderstandings. Please don’t assume anything, so make sure you clarify your doubts and have a good communication with the family members. There are chances for real estate deals, home improvement projects, renovation and relocation too.

Mars and Mercury are impacting the ninth house, so you will have updates about long trips and foreign settlements. Both the planets don’t like each other, so there will be some issues with your fatherly figures, teachers or mentors too. You will have to control your speech, otherwise, it will create controversies. The ninth house indicates higher studies, and this week will bring such opportunities so, many Cancer Sun, Moon and rising natives will take certifications, enrol in a course or even write an exam. The transit will bring pilgrimages, pleasure trips, global ventures spiritual activities, writing and publishing too.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: The third week of March will not have major transits, other than Neptune, the god of oceans conjuncting the Sun in your ninth house. You will have many plans for long distance travels, foreign collaborations, and cultural exchange. So, you will be booking tickets, preparing travel documents, and it can be for official or personal matter. Some people will attend workshops, training sessions, or online classes that need focus and participation. The Sun and Neptune conjunction can cause delay or confusion in the long trips, so you need to cross check your tickets, travel plans, and accommodation related papers, otherwise there are chances for missing them.

The aspect of Sun and Neptune will fall on the third house, and that can bring sudden projects from communication based domain. You will send messages, but they need clarification or receive incomplete information from others. Other than long trips, you may get traveling within local area, such as visiting offices, serving centres, which required repeated checking of addresses and timings. The third house indicates siblings, so you may have some arguments with them as well. You will have recurrent meetings about one particular matter with siblings, neighbours or coworkers. The neck to hand area will be sensitive, so you have to take care especially if you had history of such sensitivity.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the eighth house, and they will drag your focus into shared resources, tax, PF and loans. Mars is the planet for financial liabilities, so you will have to be careful with your existing loans, repayment and other financial transactions. You will be visiting banks, other financial institutions, speak with financial advisors, or handle matters related to joint assets. Mars and Mercury can bring arguments with someone regarding money, so make sure you keep the record of all the financial transactions.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: Financial matters will be of utmost importance during this week as there is a huge planetary transit happening in Aries, which rules your eighth house. The Sun, Venus and Neptune are in charge of your financial matters, so you will spend time in handling bank related work, insurance, papers, tax payments or loan discussions. Some of you had plan to take a new loan, or settle some loans, which will happen during this week. The Sun, Venus, Neptune trio is not good in the eight houses, so there will be unexpected expenses, so you need to be prepared for that.

These three planets will aspect the second house, and that will increase the importance of financial matters. However, there are chances for you to get promotions or appraisals, but getting through them will not be a cake walk, so you need to work hard for that. The Sun will be here for the next twenty plus days so you have enough time to work for that. Job seekers will have the closest opportunities to get a new job, so please try the level best to expand your job search. Public speaking opportunities will come up, but clashes are also showing during this week.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the water sign of Pisces, and both the planets do not like to be here, so you will have to be careful with your love life. Both are fast and furious planets, so you will have many opportunities to argue with spouse, but you should withdraw from all, so that you can be peaceful. There will be client meetings, online and offline meetings as well, but please don’t overshare anything about yourself. You will also attend social gatherings, like marriage, birth day parties or business meets as well. Both the planets will aspect the first house, so you may also be a bit impatient.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: The last week of March will highlight your relationships, as the Sun, Neptune, and Venus will be in the fire sign of Aries. You will attend meetings, as the seventh house indicates public, so you will be more visible in the public, which will also bring opportunities. Those who were going through relationship issues have to be very careful as the Sun-Venus-Neptune combo is not good in the seventh house. There will be arguments in the relationships, and if you don’t handle with care, there will be long lasting damages. The transit Neptune may bring fake business offers, so make sure you cross check the terms and conditions of such agreements.

The Sun, Venus and Neptune will impact the first house, so you will be attending some social gatherings during this week. Venus will bring good opportunities for single Libra Sun, Moon and rising signs to find someone special but you have to be careful while you share personal information with anyone. This is a complex phase, so make sure you keep patience even if someone is not favouring you. These three planets will aspect the first house, and it can bring concerns like headache or fever, so make sure you take care of your health too.

Mars and Mercury are moving through Pisces, which rules your health and liabilities, and both the planets will bring heavy activity in daily work, and routines. Mars will make you to work in multiple tasks, while Mercury will increase the communication over the mail, phone, and you will have to coordinate with your team. There are chances to argue with your team mates, so make sure you are patient with everyone. The sixth house also indicates health, so you will have to take care of the health, and diet and workout is very important.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: The last week of March will start with multiple tasks as the Sun, Venus and Neptune is moving through the sixth house. You will have multiple projects, and that can only happen through the support of your team, so you need to have good understanding with each other. The Sun, Neptune and Venus will bring issues with colleagues, so make sure you don’t trigger anyone at work. Job seekers will have the closest opportunities to get a new job, or if you already have issues at work, it can get aggravated during this time. You will also take part in competitive events like interviews, tests or sports items.

The Sun, Venus and Neptune will aspect the twelfth house, so the physical and mental health is very important, Health related new plans will come up like doctor visits, lab tests, or you will start new fitness plans. You will also have to stay away from anything which can create controversies. Neptune is the planet for illusion, so you will have some complex dreams, but please don’t connect it with the events in the daily life. There will be private conversation and some projects where you handle them in highly secretive manner.

Mars and Mercury transit is moving through the water sign of Pisces, so you will focus on your fifth house of children and creativity. You will attend social gatherings, go on dates, or you will spend time with a young group. Single Scorpio Sun, Moon and rising signs will have the closest opportunities to find someone special. There will be discussions for a new business venture, but kindly avoid huge investments too. There will be some creative work like content creation, design, or entertainment work, and you will have to do some editing works also. Parents will attend school meetings or they will manage children’s personal life.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: This is a very important week for your creativity, romance, and leisure as the Sun, Venus and Neptune are moving through the fifth house. The fifth house indicates centerstage, so, you will be visible in the public domain. This week will bring social outings, entertainment events, and you will spend time in hobbies such as sports, music , or creative work. Single Sun, Moon and rising sign natives will find someone special, but there are chances for getting pranked, so make sure you take time to understand them. Please don’t be in a hurry to start a new relationship.

Parents will spend more time with your children, and there will be some school related activities, meetings, or non-academic projects for children. You will spend money on games, sports or you will also attend entertainment activities. The Sun, Venus and Neptune will aspect the eleventh house, so you will have team work. This is not the time to start a new venture, as Neptune can bring fake projects. There are chances for changes in the plans, cancel meetings, or the team members will provide fake information about timing or project details. There are chances for clashes with team mates, and you should avoid that.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the fourth house, and it will bring a lot of activity at home, and within family members. Mars itself is the planet for construction, and demolition, so there are huge chances for meeting with building contractor to check the possibilities for construction or renovation. This is a complex time for family members as there are chances for arguments too. Please make sure you keep peace at home, otherwise there will be long lasting challenges. There will be family gatherings, and you may even go to visit your friends and family.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: For Capricorn Sun, Moon and rising signs, will have their primary focus on the family and home, as the Sun, Venus, and Neptune will be in the fourth house. You will spend time in cleaning, rearranging furniture, or organising your home. This is a very important time for home improvement projects, some of you will buy home appliances, décor, or groceries for a long time. There will be family gatherings, you will host relatives, or visit your parents, or friends, and they may also visit with you. There will be property related discussions, or some of your relatives will go abroad or someone will come back.

These three planets will aspect the tenth house, which rules your career, and there are huge chances to get new job or a new add on project in the existing work. Since Neptune is the planet for illusion, there are chances for some confusion at work, so make sure you cross check all the mails, and projects before the final submission. You will have to confirm meeting time, resent work updates, or clarify the client expectations. There are chances for arguments with your managers, but please try to keep the patience. Job seekers will expand the job search, as there will be multiple opportunities.

Mars and Mercury are moving through the water sign of Pisces, and both planets doesn’t like to be here, so you will feel work related burden. There will be multiple meetings online and offline, and the life will be very communicative. You will make multiple phone calls, you will have short travels, and local meetings, so you will be very busy. This week will bring arguments with your siblings, neighbours or friends, so make sure your communications are not over the top. There will be some opportunities from communications related domain like teaching, preaching and publishing too.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: Aquarius Sun, Moon or rising signs will have a busy schedule for the next twenty plus days as the Sun is in Aries. The Sun will conjunct Neptune , and Venus which will give mixed results. There will be a lot of short trips, which can be for learning and personal purpose. You will make a lot of phone calls or get them, so, you will be using more messaging devices during this week. Online transactions will be plenty, but you should avoid commenting on sensitive topics in the social media, otherwise it will spark controversies.

The Sun, Neptune and Venus trio will aspect the ninth house, so you will naturally have a pull for higher studies and foreign collaborations. Some of you will enrol in lengthy courses, but make sure the institutions are valid and they don’t charge much. This is a good time for spiritual matters, you can expect you going for spiritual meetings, debates and also for pilgrimages. Since Neptune is an illusionary planet, there are chances to miss the flights, and last minute cancellation of trips. Please cross check the documentation process, especially if you are applying for some exams, or visa. You will also purchase some electronic gadgets, stationary or daily use items.

Mars and Mercury are moving through Pisces, so this is the time where you handle a lot of financial transactions and daily spending. Mars is the planet for financial liabilities so you will spend a lot of money, but Mercury will force you to keep an account of it. You should not start any new investment, which are illegal, otherwise there will be huge loss in the future. This is also the time where you discuss the new loans, tax and insurance, but make sure you cross check the conditions before that. New job opportunities can also come in full time or freelance mode.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting March 22
content: The transit Mars and Mercury are moving through the water sign of Pisces, and your personal life is going through some challenges. Both the planets are fast and furious, so you are destined to handle some serious matters, especially connected with your personal life. You will focus on your health care, and you will take up new medication or fitness programs. This is the time to move around, attend one to one meeting, and handle personal responsibilities. Whatever you do, you will do it with the idea to improve your entire life. There will be many opportunities to start a new business or even a new job.

The Sun, Venus and Neptune are moving through the second house, so your financial matters are very important. Firstly, you are not sailing through the safe waters, so control your expenses, otherwise there will be long term financial challenges. You will check your bank balance, pay bills, and handle regular expenses like groceries, fuel or household items. There will be sudden expenses, and you need to be prepared for that. The second house indicates job, and earnings, so there are huge chances for job seekers to get a job, so they should expand their job search.

Neptune, the planet for illusion can bring fake investment plans, so you need to stay away from such plans. The Sun, Venus and Neptune will aspect the eighth house, so, you will have to double check the details related to loans, tax, PF and insurance. During this week, you will also check about joint accounts, and there are chances for arguments with the people involved in this. There will be some delays in processing financial documents and getting some funds too. The eighth house indicates spiritual matters, so you will also go for spiritual readings, and therapies.
